human-review.evidence: Kevin: supervised each app-run batch boundary live (2026-07-04) and approved the epic close-out ('do it'); post-epic verification: cross-feature integration suite green (1890/1890 vitest), full Playwright e2e 179/185 with the 5 failures adjudicated as a box-wide environmental clipboard wedge (proven outside the app), typecheck green. Recorded 2026-07-05.

loopbacks.reason: Implementer-reported frozen-test defect (ADR-009 route, shift-left before review): TEST-1911 in tests/agent-stdio-attach.test.ts spawns its pane with rows: 7 and asserts expect(result.rows).toBe(7) - that exact literal 'toBe(7)' collides with feature 0009's repo-wide residual guard TEST-384 (tests/shared/orky-pane-migration.test.ts), which forbids any literal SCHEMA_VERSION=7 value pin in tests/** outside its two documented allow-list hits. The collision is dimension-choice noise, not substance: fix = respawn dims rows 7 -> 9 in the frozen file (cols stay 44). No production code change expected from this loopback; the second full-suite failure (TEST-1910 counting two import STATEMENTS of @xterm/headless in replay.ts) was implementation-side and is already fixed by merging the imports into one specifier.

implementer.reason: Router requested A/B (orky:implementer + codex:codex-rescue) on the networking+determinism concerns, but this driver environment has no parallel agent-dispatch tool and one shared worktree (two concurrent implementers would collide); codex exec has a recorded stall precedent on this box (0016 implement re-entry 3) and per ADR-025 codex never holds the pipeline. orky:implementer (Claude, driver-inline) ran solo: 6 source/config/doc artifacts (session-api.ts + replay.ts + session-store.ts new; session.ts/validate.ts/remote-agent-api.ts extended in place; @xterm/headless ^5.5.0 dep; remote-agent.md section), one ADR-009 tests loopback en route (TEST-1911 rows-7 literal collided with 0009's repo-wide toBe(7) residual guard TEST-384; fixed at the tests phase, freeze re-captured) plus one implementation-side barrier redesign after the frozen ordering-invariant vector caught snapshot/window double-coverage (barrier now opens synchronously with the attach dispatch). Implement gate green (build+test+both freezes); codex reserved for a bounded read-only verifier cross-check at review.
